introSection: Öfsökö Öfkesi is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. Alongside Uzaya Yolculuk, it is the first roller coaster from Chinese company Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment to be built in Europe. It was erected in late 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Orange track with green supports. As is typical with roller coasters manufactured in China, the ride was painted on-site rather than at the factory.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Unlike the Maurer SkyLoop it was based on, which uses lap bars, the train on this knock-off model uses hard over-the-shoulder restraints. Making it very painful.

fullText:
Öfsökö Öfkesi is a steel roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. Alongside Uzaya Yolculuk, it is the first roller coaster from Chinese company Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment to be built in Europe. It was erected in late 2015.

Orange track with green supports. As is typical with roller coasters manufactured in China, the ride was painted on-site rather than at the factory.

Unlike the Maurer SkyLoop it was based on, which uses lap bars, the train on this knock-off model uses hard over-the-shoulder restraints. Making it very painful.


 * Photograph of the train on Facebook
 * Photograph of the roller coaster under construction on Facebook
 * Photograph of the roller coaster being painted on Facebook
